languages.text: "Все это низменная возня, не стоящая моего внимания. Слышать о ней не желаю".

traits.locale_text: "Довольно. Всё это низменная возня, не стоящая моего внимания. Слышать о ней не желаю".

languages.text: "This is a lowly little row, unworthy of my attention. I do not want to hear another word about it."
languages.original_text: "Все это низменная возня, не стоящая моего внимания. Слышать о ней не желаю".

traits.locale_text: "This is a lowly little row, unworthy of my attention. I do not want to hear another word about it."
"This is a lowly little row, unworthy of my attention. I do not want to hear another word about it."
"This is a lowly little row, unworthy of my attention. I do not want to hear another word about it."

languages.text: 「この卑劣な小さな争いは、私の注意に値しない。もうこの件について聞きたくない」
languages.original_text: "This is a lowly little row, unworthy of my attention. I do not want to hear another word about it."

languages.text: "Bu, ilgime değmeyecek küçük bir ağız dalaşı. Bu konuda tek bir kelime daha duymak istemiyorum."
languages.original_text: "This is a lowly little row, unworthy of my attention. I do not want to hear another word about it."

traits.locale_text: "Bu, ilgime değmeyecek küçük bir ağız dalaşı. Bu konuda tek bir kelime daha duymak istemiyorum."

languages.text: “不过是场无足轻重的纷争，不值得我关注。不要再提了。”
languages.original_text: "This is a lowly little row, unworthy of my attention. I do not want to hear another word about it."

traits.locale_text: “不过是场无足轻重的纷争，不值得我关注。不要再提了。”

languages.text: "Dieser kleine Aufruhr ist meine Aufmerksamkeit nicht wert. Ich will nichts mehr davon hören."
languages.original_text: "This is a lowly little row, unworthy of my attention. I do not want to hear another word about it."

traits.locale_text: "Dieser kleine Aufruhr ist meine Aufmerksamkeit nicht wert. Ich will nichts mehr davon hören."

languages.text: « Peu m'importe vos enfantillages, débrouillez-vous sans moi. J'en ai assez entendu. »
languages.original_text: "This is a lowly little row, unworthy of my attention. I do not want to hear another word about it."

traits.locale_text: « Peu m'importe vos enfantillages, débrouillez-vous sans moi. J'en ai assez entendu. »

languages.text: «Esto no requiere mi atención. No vuelva a mencionar el asunto».
languages.original_text: "This is a lowly little row, unworthy of my attention. I do not want to hear another word about it."

traits.locale_text: «Esto no requiere mi atención. No vuelva a mencionar el asunto».
